PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { $proc = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $cmd = \(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($_.OwningProcess\)" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).CommandLine; "PID $\($_.OwningProcess\) \($\($proc.ProcessName\)\) -> $cmd" })

PowerShell($tsx = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'tsx' -and $_.CommandLine -match 'src/index.ts' }; if \($tsx\) { $tsx | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force }; "stopped tsx watcher\(s\)" } else { "no tsx watcher running" })

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'tsx|Backend_ReVamped' } | Select-Object ProcessId, @{N='Cmd';E={$_.CommandLine.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(160, $_.CommandLine.Length\)\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap)

PowerShell($p = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=8424"; if \($p\) { "PID 8424 = " + $p.Name + ": " + $p.CommandLine.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(150, $p.CommandLine.Length\)\) } else { "PID 8424 not found" })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($conn\) { $p = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($conn.OwningProcess\)"; "PID $\($conn.OwningProcess\): $\($p.Name\) — $\($p.CommandLine.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(180, $p.CommandLine.Length\)\)\)" } else { "Port 4000 free" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess, @{N='Process';E={\(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($_.OwningProcess\)"\).Name}})

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($conn\) { Stop-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -Force; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; "Stopped backend on PID $\($conn.OwningProcess\)" } else { "Port 4000 free" })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($conn\) { Stop-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -Force; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 600; "Stopped backend on PID $\($conn.OwningProcess\)" } else { "Port 4000 free" })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($conn\) { Stop-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -Force; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 600; "Killed backend on PID $\($conn.OwningProcess\)" } else { "Port 4000 free" })
